goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:30' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '4 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:30 and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on thursday and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 4 people
Make sure you get the reference number
